name: Grok Build 0.1
archDisplay: Architecture undisclosed; a dedicated, fast agentic-coding model (100+ tok/s) purpose-built to power the Grok Build CLI, distinct from the general-purpose Grok line
note: Confirmed real and distinct: xAI's (SpaceXAI's) first model purpose-built for agentic coding, powering the Grok Build CLI/terminal agent. Opened to developers via the API in public beta on ~May 29, 2026, a bit after the underlying model went live (~May 20, 2026). 256K context, text+image input, always-on reasoning, function calling, structured outputs, native MCP ('bring your own MCP') support. Not to be confused with 'Grok Build' the product/CLI/agent name, which Grok 4.5 now also powers as of July 2026 — Grok Build 0.1 was the original dedicated coding model before Grok 4.5 became the CLI's default.
verificationNotes: Existence confirmed via SpaceXAI's own docs page (docs.x.ai/developers/models/grok-build-0.1) and multiple independent write-ups (DevOps.com, Kilo Code blog, OpenRouter, Vercel AI Gateway, Kingy.ai) all describing the same model with matching specs: 256K context, $1/$2 per Mtok pricing, text+image input. Release-date sources disagree in the details — different write-ups cite May 14, May 20, May 27, and May 29, 2026 for various milestones (underlying model live vs. subscriber CLI rollout vs. public API beta); I used May 20, 2026 as the best-supported date for the model itself going live, per Kilo Code's blog and a cross-source search, but flagged this as approximate. IMPORTANT: I could NOT find a credible, corroborated benchmark score for this model. One set of aggregator sites (Pickurai, Superconductor, BenchLM) mentioned a ~70.8% SWE-Bench Verified figure, but two independent direct-fetch sources (DevOps.com and Kingy.ai) explicitly state the model 'enters without published benchmarks' and its profile 'does not include independent SWE benchmark results or repository-level testing.' Given this direct contradiction, I omitted all benchmark results for this model rather than report an unconfirmed number.
